---
name: Feature request / idea
about: Suggest a mode, integration, or improvement
title: "[idea] "
labels: enhancement
---

**The idea**
What would you like claude-f-me to do?

**Why**
What does it make possible or better?

**How might it work?**
Rough sketch — a new tool, pattern, persona, bridge, game, etc. (optional).

**Safety / privacy / rate-limit considerations**
Anything that touches device control, transmits data, or calls a model? How would it stay within
the safety cap, keep data local, and respect usage limits?
